title: Legend of the Galactic Heroes: Overture to a New War
original_title: 銀河英雄伝説外伝／新たなる戦いの序曲（オーヴァチュア）
overview: Reinhard von Müsel and Yang Wen-li return to their respective homes, one victorious and the other defeated. While Reinhard earns the new name Lohengramm, while Yang and his friends celebrate some welcome news.
